# Arjun Varadiyil

Full Stack Developer building scalable news, editorial, and CMS platforms using Next.js & Payload CMS.

Based in Kerala. Focused on high-performance web applications and production-grade systems.
Currently exploring AI agents and modern AI workflows.

- Website: https://arjunvaradiyil.in
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arjunvaradiyil
- GitHub: https://github.com/arjunvaradiyil/arjun.varadiyil

---

## Projects

**Kochi Muziris Biennale Platform**
Next.js + Payload CMS
Content-driven platform with optimized performance and SEO.
https://arjunvaradiyil.in/projects/kochi-muziris-biennale
https://www.kochimuzirisbiennale.org/

**Prajasakti News Platform**
Modern editorial system
Scalable publishing workflow with fast load times.
https://arjunvaradiyil.in/projects/prajasakti-news-portal
https://prajasakti.com/

**Know Kerala**
Content platform
Structured CMS architecture for regional content delivery.
https://arjunvaradiyil.in/projects/know-kerala-quiz-platform
https://www.knowkeralam.com/

**My Vote My Voice**
Civic engagement platform
Built for accessibility, reach, and reliability.
https://arjunvaradiyil.in/projects/my-vote-my-voice-idukki
https://myidukki.com/

---

## Stack

Next.js · React · Payload CMS · Node.js · MongoDB · TypeScript · REST APIs
